title: GSR 145(E)-06th February, 2018 Seeks to further amend Goods and Services Tax Settlement of Funds Rules, 2017
description: GSR 145(E)-06th February, 2018 Seeks to further amend Goods and Services Tax Settlement of Funds Rules, 2017

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 66] ubZ fnYyh] eaxyokj] iQjojh 6] 2018@ek?k 17] 1939 No. 66] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 6, 2018/MAGHA 17, 1939 िव牵 मं灴ालय िव牵 मं灴ालय िव牵 मं灴ालय िव牵 मं灴ालय (राज瀡व िवभाग) (राज瀡व िवभाग) (राज瀡व िवभाग) (राज瀡व िवभाग) अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना नई 琈द瀖ली, 6 फरवरी, 2018 सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. 145 145 145 145(अ) (अ) (अ) (अ)....— — — —के瀈灶ीय सरकार, के瀈灶ीय माल और सेवा कर अिधिनयम, 2017 (2017 का 12) क琉 धारा 17 के साथ प琇ठत धारा 53 और एक琉कृत माल और सेवा कर अिधिनयम, 2017 (2017 का 13) क琉 धारा 17 और 18 तथा संघ रा榖य楹े灴 माल और सेवा कर अिधिनयम, 2017 (2017 का 14) क琉 धारा 21 獧ारा 灹द牵 शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, माल और सेवा कर िनिधय犘 का िनपटान िनयम, 2017 म犆 िन瀓निलिखत संशोधन करती है, अथा榁त्:— 1. (1) इन िनयम犘 का संि楹玅 नाम माल और सेवा कर िनिधय犘 का िनपटान (संशोधन) िनयम, 2018 है। (2) ये राजप灴 म犆 उनके 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृ牵 ह犘गे। 2. माल और सेवा कर िनिधय犘 का िनपटान िनयम, 2017 के िनयम 11 के उप-िनयम (2) के प瀙चात्, िन瀓निलिखत उप-िनयम अ瀈त:瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त्:— ‘’(3) के瀈灶ीय सरकार, 琈कसी िविश玗 िव瀄तीय वष榁 म犆 琈कसी भी समय, माल और सेवा कर प琇रषद क琉 िसफा琇रश犘 पर उस िविश玗 िव瀄तीय वष榁 म犆 सं灡हीत एक琉कृत माल और सेवा कर क琉 琈कसी रािश का अनंितम 牲प से िनपटान कर सकेगी िजसका अब तक िनपटान नह牷 琈कया गया है।‘’ [फा. सं. एस-31013/16/2017-एसटी-I--डीओआर] एस. आर. मीना, अवर सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पण ण ण ण :::: मूल िनयम भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग-II, खंड 3, उप-खंड (i) म犆 सा.का.िन. 964(अ), तारीख 27 जुलाई, 2017 獧ारा 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th February, 2018 G.S.R. 145(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 53 read with section 17 of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 (12 of 2017), sections 17 and 18 of the Integrated Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 (13 of 2017) and section 21 of the Union Territory Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 (14 of 2017), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the Goods and Services Tax Settlement of Funds Rules, 2017, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Goods and Services Tax Settlement of Funds (Amendment) Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Goods and Services Tax Settlement of Funds Rules, 2017, in rule 11, after sub-rule (2), the following sub-rule shall be inserted, namely:— “(3) At any point of time in any particular financial year, the Central Government may, on the recommendations of the Goods and Services Tax Council, provisionally settle any sum of integrated goods and services tax collected in that particular financial year which has not been settled so far.” [F. No. 31013/16/2017-ST-I-DoR] S. R. MEENA, Under Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part- II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), vide number G.S.R. 964(E), dated the 27th July, 2017. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
